name: IdsEdwClmCobFDel

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT c.CLM_COB_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_COB_F c JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_CLM_DEL d ON d.SRC_SYS_CD = c.SRC_SYS_CD AND d.CLM_ID = c.CLM_ID) DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_COB_F WHERE CLM_COB_SK IN (SELECT CLM_COB_SK FROM cte)

Annotations:
Job : IdsEdwClmCobFDel
Read Clm_Cob_F for sk to be deleted
Delete process is done before loading to remove historical data that no longer exists in the source system.
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file

This file is an append
Load file created in the previous job will be loaded into the target DB2 table here. 

Update logic; "Update then Insert" Or "Insert then Update" will be chosen depending on the nature of data going into the table. If there are more updates than Inserts, then Update then Insert should be selected.
When the Inserts are more than Updates, then Insert then Update should be selected
